title: Department Manager Vacancy at Evok International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Evok International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Evok International Enterprises! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Amritsar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Evok International Enterprises:
Evok International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Evok International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
